subject: Hop, a young trainer character with purple hair in a blue fur-trimmed jacket, standing confidently in a countryside landscape
description: A young trainer stands in a forward-facing mid-shot against an open countryside backdrop of green hills, a dirt road, and blue sky with white clouds. The figure wears a blue hoodie-style jacket with a fur-trimmed hood, and has short purple hair. The pose is relaxed and confident, hands loosely at the sides. The composition is bright and cheerful with soft natural lighting. This is a Trainer Supporter card for the character Hop from the Sword and Shield games.
background: green countryside hills, dirt path, blue sky, white clouds
